jsonLd.title: MobiKwik is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at MobiKwik are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About MobiKwik:
MobiKwik is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MobiKwik!
